special_mechanics.name: Platform Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Player controls a humanlike statue that must jump from platform to platform while defeating monsters. Core platforming mechanic involving vertical and horizontal traversal.

special_mechanics.name: Boss Battles
special_mechanics.description: Action sequences culminate in boss encounters at the end of each stage. Final level is a boss marathon leading to the final fight.

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative) - Wikipedia source contains gameplay description but no quantitative physics parameters. The game features traditional side-scrolling platforming with jump-based mechanics and boss battles, but specific movement values are not documented in available sources.
